title: Typescript ^5.0.0 compat?
author: iiian
body: Please confirm compatibility with `typescript@^5.0.0`? Anecdotally, I've run into an issue where `exceljs` works with `typescript@4.9.4` but not `typescript@5.3.2`, and I'm wondering what kind of testing has been done w/ the latest ts. Wanted to ask before I do the work of writing/raising a whole issue, thanks!
